zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Worsley於1318年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃斯利時，他的父親Henry de Worsley16歲，母親Alice Radcliffe38歲。他於大約1343年與Anabel de Haydock結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Worsley was born in 1318, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Worsley, was 16 and his mother, Alice Radcliffe, was 38. He married Anabel de Haydock about 1343. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1355, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Worsley est né en 1318, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Worsley, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Alice Radcliffe, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Anabel de Haydock environ 1343. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1355, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Worsley 1318 in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Worsley 16 und seine Mutter Alice Radcliffe 38. Er hat um 1343 Anabel de Haydock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Worsley è nato il nel 1318 nel Worsley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Worsley, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Alice Radcliffe, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Anabel de Haydock circa 1343. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1355, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Worsley(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Worsley(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Radcliffe(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1343년 Anabel de Haydock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.
